purpose: Upgrade the prior Grok actor/persona framing into a bounded external AI agent input surface for L2 caseflow support while preserving independence, refusal boundaries, and authority=false.

upgrade_from.problem: Persona framing can trigger refusal and may imply role adoption by the external model.
upgrade_from.meaning: Grok is treated as an external assistant output source whose responses may be captured, timestamped, hashed, and routed into L0/L1/L2 review without claiming Grok has joined the system.

l2_anchor.name: jaywisdom.base.eth
l2_anchor.role: human-readable L2 namespace anchor for Jay Wisdom / Computer Wisdom artifacts
l2_anchor.chain_assumption: Base L2 namespace context only unless a concrete transaction or ENS text-record receipt is provided
l2_anchor.no_ghost_anchor_rule: Do not claim ENS/Base completion without visible transaction, UID, text-record, or commit receipt.

may_do: analyze a real public claim when provided
may_not_do: sign or anchor on Base without an explicit wallet transaction

canonical_rule: Grok may be used as an external AI agent input surface. It does not become the system, the verifier, the court, the signer, the wallet, the ENS owner, or the L2 authority. jaywisdom.base.eth is the namespace anchor; receipts decide completion.
